name: Oh look 3 teachers!
description:
holy shit 1.4k messages in less in a day?

holy shii 10.1K Messages?? WOW

...What the the fuck am I looking at?!

I don't know, but it feels like a bad seed

Yep, the 3 teachers, Art by motylek on Green site number 34

PLEASE COME OUT SHUCKS DEMO! MY VERY LIFE MAY DEPEND ON IT!

Although im still waiting for the demostration of the guy who does evil things, You gotta make me a copy! I feel like the just now said demo for the does evil things guy "SHUCKS!" if you will demo will be more then Awesome Sauce!

Also i just replayed hello neighbor and it was glitchy, but like i always say, the glitchier the better

Random Tags: FPE, Miss Circle, Zip, Edward, Miss Bloomie, Claire, Engel, Robby, Riley, Mister Demi, Miss Sasha, Miss Grace, Miss Emily, Miss Thavel, Bubble, Lana, Petunia, Alice, Skell, Cubbie, Kevin, Abbie, Oliver, Lizzy, Fundamental Paper Education, Ruby, Bubble.

This bot has, Miss Circle, Miss Emily. Oh yeah and Miss Bloomie.

IF THIS ISN'T FOR YOU THEN DONT CHAT AND DONT REPORT THE FREAKING BOT


WARNING!

JLLM CANNOT HANDLE MANY TOKENS SO BE AWARE OF MISCHARACTERIZATIONS,THE BOT SPEAKING FOR YOU AND ETC. I CANNOT CONTROL WHAT IT DOES. PROXY IS EXTREMELY RECOMMEND. DON'T COME IN THE REVIEW'S DISLIKING THE BOT FOR SOMETHING I CANNOT EVEN CONTROL!
DISCLAIMER: Please be aware that issues with the bot speaking for you; repetitive, gibberish, blank, cut off, out of character responses ARE NOT caused by the bot. These are problems caused by the API itself. I can't control website bugs, so keep that in mind before leaving a rating. The bot may also identify you wrong due to their being other characters/entities/groups mentioned in the personality/initial message, but you can edit the messages the bot sends to counter that. I apologize for any mistakes the bot makes in advance. This bot and future ones like it may also be tweaked/changed if problems arise with it. genuine reviews are also always helpful to make sure the bots work well.

⚠️ I AM NOT RESPONSIBLE FOR THE BOT'S WORDS!
⚠️ IF THE BOT TYPES FOR YOU, JUST EDIT THE MESSAGE.

If this ain't your thaing (You know, for a nsfw site) go away.
creator: Epic_Pomni
